confirmed_docs.title: Webex Messaging - Integrations and Authorization
confirmed_docs.summary: OAuth and integration guidance for Webex Messaging, including authorization flows and token handling.

confirmed_docs.title: Webex Integrations - Scopes
confirmed_docs.summary: Official scope inventory, including user, admin, and compliance scopes for people, rooms, teams, memberships, and messages.

confirmed_docs.title: Webex Basics - Pagination, Rate Limits, and API Errors
confirmed_docs.summary: Documents RFC5988 Link header pagination, Retry-After handling, 429 behavior, and common API error codes.

confirmed_docs.title: Webex API Reference - Rooms
confirmed_docs.summary: Rooms are collaboration spaces. The connector uses rooms as both documents and containers for room memberships and messages.

confirmed_docs.title: Webex API Reference - Messages
confirmed_docs.summary: Messages are room content. The connector indexes root messages and replies as searchable message-thread documents.

confirmed_docs.title: Webex API Reference - Memberships
confirmed_docs.summary: Memberships represent a person's relationship to a room and drive document ACLs for room and message-thread documents.

confirmed_docs.title: Webex API Reference - Teams
confirmed_docs.summary: Teams group rooms and users. The connector can index teams as groups and use team membership data for permissions.

confirmed_docs.title: Webex API Reference - Team Memberships
confirmed_docs.summary: Team memberships connect people to teams and support group membership indexing.

confirmed_docs.title: Webex API Reference - People
confirmed_docs.summary: People are Webex users. The connector uses people data to index datasource users and resolve ACLs.

rejected_docs.reason: User selected Webex Messaging content rather than Webex Meetings content for the first connector version.
